actionUnits.condition: Extinguish by water hits. Target MonoBehaviour is Fire (m_Script guid: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d) on GameObject 'Fire-Wrapper - L - 1 - 1'. Scene serialization confirms fields: isOn=0 (must be set to 1 before this test), maxHitInterval=2, totalHitTime=5, mainEffectGo fileID=1849464941111748095, BoxCollider present (no Rigidbody). During this trigger window, an external water system must repeatedly invoke IWaterInteractable.WaterHit(Vector3) on this object at intervals < 2s so that currentHitTime accumulates to >=5s. Expected behavior: Fire turns off (isOn=false), UpdateFireState(true) stops ParticleSystem on mainEffectGo, notifies neighbors, and calls FireController.Instance.FireChanged(-1).

Ignition via neighbor spread. Fire script (guid: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d) has timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, onNeighborsThreshold=2, maxNeighborDistance=4, downMultiplier=2, minNeighborDownDistance=3. Precondition: Populate 'neighbors' with at least 2 nearby Fire instances within 4 units and set those neighbors isOn=true; ensure FindNeighbors(...) has been called or neighbors list is manually populated in the inspector. Optionally, include one neighbor positioned lower by >3 units to activate faster countdown via downMultiplier. When onNeighbors>=2, shouldTurnOn becomes true and after the randomized timeToOn in [40,60]s, this fire should set isOn=true and call UpdateFireState(true). Expected: ParticleSystem on mainEffectGo plays, NotifyAllNeighbors executes, FireController.Instance.FireChanged(+1).

Cancel turning-off if water hits stop. With isOn=true, invoke IWaterInteractable.WaterHit(Vector3) once to set isTurningOff=true, then stop hits and wait > maxHitInterval (2s). Expected: Update() path detects currentHitInterval>=2s, resets isTurningOff=false and currentHitTime=0 while keeping isOn=true; no call to UpdateFireState occurs.
